summary: This is an extremely brief post consisting of a single sentence noting that Amazon has launched full-text search of books. Joel is flagging what he sees as a noteworthy development in technology and publishing. The post contains no analysis or argument, serving purely as a link-blog style announcement. It reflects the early 2000s blogging style of sharing notable tech news with minimal commentary.
key_points: Amazon launched full-text search capability for books, a significant milestone in digital publishing
The post exemplifies the link-blog format common in early 2000s tech blogging
money_quotes: Amazon now searches the full text of books.
key_insight: Amazon's introduction of full-text book search marked a notable step in making physical book content digitally searchable.
